zh.lifeSummary: 當Guy de Brienne於1202年出生在英國威爾斯布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特時，他的父親Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT26歲，母親Marie de Lusignan27歲。他於1220年6月1日與Jane Pole在西班牙結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他在英國威爾斯被列為governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles 。他去世於1252年6月1日在他的家鄉享年50歲，埋葬在威爾士布洛可爾布利其史德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guy de Brienne于1202年出生在英国威尔斯布洛可爾哈維福德維斯特时，他的父亲Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT26岁，母亲Marie de Lusignan27岁。他于1220年6月1日与Jane Pole在西班牙结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他在英国威尔斯被列为governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles 。他去世于1252年6月1日在他的家乡享年50岁，埋葬在威尔士布洛可爾布利其史德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Guy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of a compound name starting with witu ‘wood’ or wīt ‘wide’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to England. In Old French initial w- regularly became gu-. The usual Norman forms of the name were Gy or Guido. In medieval Latin the same name is found as Wido. It was a popular name among the Normans, enhanced no doubt by the romance of Guy of Warwick, recounting the exploits of a folk hero of the Crusades.

en.lifeSummary: When Guy de Brienne was born in 1202, in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom, his father, Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT, was 26 and his mother, Marie de Lusignan, was 27. He married Jane Pole on 1 June 1220, in Spain. They were the parents of at least 1 son. His occupation is listed as governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles  in Wales, United Kingdom. He died on 1 June 1252, in his hometown, at the age of 50, and was buried in Bridgend, Pembrokeshire, Wales.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guy de Brienne est né en 1202, à Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT, avait 26 ans et sa mère, Marie de Lusignan, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Jane Pole le 1 juin 1220, à Espagne. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Sa profession de son indiquée est governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles  à Pays de Galles, Royaume-Uni. Il est décédé le 1 juin 1252, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Bridgend, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guy de Brienne 1202 in Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Wales, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT 26 und seine Mutter Marie de Lusignan 27. Er hat am 1. Juni 1220 in Spanien Jane Pole geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. sein Beruf ist als governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles  in Wales, United Kingdom aufgeführt. Er starb am 1. Juni 1252 im Alter von 50 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Bridgend, Pembrokeshire, Wales begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Brienne è nato il nel 1202 nel Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Galles, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT, aveva 26 anni e il suo madre, Marie de Lusignan, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Jane Pole il 1 giugno 1220, nel Spagna. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. La sua occupazione è indicata come governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles  nel Galles, Regno Unito. Morì il 1 giugno 1252, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 50 anni, e fu sepolto a Bridgend, Pembrokeshire, Galles.

ja.lifeSummary: Guy de Brienneが1202年にイギリスウェールズペンブロケシュアイアヘイバーフォードウエストで生まれた時，父Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KTは26歳，母Marie de Lusignanは27歳であった。1220年6月1日にスペインでJane Poleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。イギリスウェールズでの職業はgovernor of carmarthen and cardigan castles と記録されている。彼は1252年6月1日に故郷で50歳で死去し，ウェールズペンブロケシュアイアブリジェンドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Guy de Brienne(이)가 1202년 영국 웨일스 p브로케실르 하버퍼드w스트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT(은)는 26세였고, 그의 어머니 Marie de Lusignan(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1220년 6월 1일 스페인에서 Jane Pole(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그의 직업은 영국 웨일스에서 governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles 이었다. 그는 1252년 6월 1일 그의 고향에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 웨일스 p브로케실르 브리지드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guy de Brienne nasceu em 1202, em Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Gales, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT, tinha 26 anos e sua mãe, Marie de Lusignan, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Jane Pole em 1 de junho de 1220, em Espanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Sua profissão aparece como governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles  em Gales, United Kingdom. Ele faleceu em 1 de junho de 1252, em sua cidade natal, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Bridgend, Pembrokeshire, Gales.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guy de Brienne родился в 1202 г. в местности хавирфордвест, пемброкешир, Уэльс, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT было 26 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie de Lusignan, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Jane Pole 1 июня 1220 г. в местности Испания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын.  Он работал по профессии governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles  в местности Уэльс, Великобритания. Он умер 1 июня 1252 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности бридженд, пемброкешир, Уэльс.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guy de Brienne nació en 1202, en Haverfordwest, Pembrokeshire, Gales, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Alphonse De Bryan Brienne Crusader Knight KT, tenía 26 años y su mamá, Marie de Lusignan, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Jane Pole el 1 de junio de 1220, en España. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Su ocupación registrada era governor of carmarthen and cardigan castles  en Gales, Reino Unido. Murió el 1 de junio de 1252, en su pueblo, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Bridgend, Pembrokeshire, Gales.
